## Checklist

- [ ] I have read `docs/contributors/quality-bar.md`.
- [ ] Links are valid — `npm run validate:references` passes.
- [ ] No generated registry artifacts included (`CATALOG.md`, `skills_index.json`, `data/*.json`).
- [ ] **Allow edits from maintainers** enabled.
